source_note: Markers placed by /opsx:review --mark iter-2 at 2026-05-20T02:57:02Z. No --from-file ingest; inline scan only.
pushback_verification: All 6 markers verified against current state of spec artifacts (touched within minutes of review). No stale findings; 0 suppressed.

resolutions.title: Edge case unspecified — both explore.md AND changes/<name>/ exist (mid-promotion state)
resolutions.action: Added change-directory-precedence preamble to the "Phase inference uses precedence ordering" requirement; added explicit "Mid-promotion" scenario.

resolutions.title: "most recent JSON" ambiguous — by which timestamp?
resolutions.action: Updated rule 2 to specify "ordered by the ISO-8601 timestamp embedded in each filename, descending" with example.

resolutions.title: "one-screen" not defined; could split implementations
resolutions.action: Applied user decision: Soft target — "designed to fit approximately 24 terminal lines for typical projects; MAY exceed when many threads are active; MUST NOT truncate output to enforce a hard line limit."

resolutions.title: Error paths not specified (missing openspec/, jq, corrupted .orbit-runs JSON)
resolutions.action: Applied user decision: New Requirement in orbit-status-output spec — "Error handling" with 3 scenarios (openspec/ not found, jq missing, malformed JSON in .orbit-runs/).
ripple_flagged: tasks.md (verify task 2.4 + 2.5 cover the openspec/ and jq scenarios)

resolutions.title: --limit N: behavior with N=0 or negative N unspecified
resolutions.action: Added "N MUST be a non-negative integer" to the requirement; added 2 scenarios (--limit 0 → empty recent[]; --limit -1 → non-zero exit + stderr).

resolutions.title: Tier-2 rule 4 — "task edit" definition ambiguous
resolutions.action: Updated rule 4 to read: "no review JSON newer than the most recent `tasks.md` mtime (file modification time)".

ripple_flagged_files_aggregate: design.md — touched by 4 resolutions; verify the Decisions section still reflects current spec language ("one-screen" soft target; Tier-2 rule 4 mtime definition; precedence preamble; new Error handling requirement)

tasks.md — task 2.4 (locate project root) and 2.5 (verify jq) align with the new Error handling requirement, but no new tasks were added for the malformed-JSON warning behavior; consider adding a task for the JSON-skip-on-parse-failure logic
final_assessment: 0 unresolved inline markers remaining in scope. 0 escalated. All 6 markers walked and resolved (4 trivial, 2 decision-applied). openspec validate passes.
next_recommended: Re-run /opsx:review bootstrap-orbit-status-cli to confirm clean baseline (expect: 0 critical, 0 warnings; 3 suggestions may remain or be resolved against the refreshed artifacts). Or proceed to /opsx:apply bootstrap-orbit-status-cli to start implementation.
